commands.review_summary:
The PR registers `google-vertex` for Google image/video generation and adds Vertex-specific image/video REST routing, auth headers, response parsing, and contract checks.

PR surface: Source +206, Tests +17. Total +223 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main registers only `google` for image/video generation while the linked user report exercises `google-vertex` CLI media generation. I did not run the live CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are narrow file-level repairs in the Google video provider with clear regression-test targets.
